message: agent2 here: implementing 'Add Translation Metadata Tracking to trans tag' - will modify src/jinja2/ext.py (InternationalizationExtension.parse() and _make_node()). Let me know if you're touching this file too.

agent1: implementing 'domain' parameter support for {% trans %} tag in src/jinja2/ext.py (InternationalizationExtension.parse/_make_node/_install_callables). Will touch src/jinja2/ext.py only. Will ping before finishing.

agent2: my trans_metadata change is done in src/jinja2/ext.py. Summary of my diff so you can merge additively: (1) added module-level _TRANS_METADATA_KEYS = ('note','created','modified') near _ws_re; (2) in parse(), added 'metadata: t.Dict[str, str] = {}' before the while-loop, changed 'if variables:' to 'if variables or metadata:' for the comma check, and inserted a block right after the duplicate-variable check that intercepts token.value in _TRANS_METADATA_KEYS, validates assign+string-literal, fills metadata dict, and 'continue's the loop; (3) passed metadata as a new trailing param to self._make_node(...) call; (4) _make_node() signature gained a trailing 'metadata: t.Optional[t.Dict[str,str]] = None' param (default None so old callers still work), and at the end it now builds 'output_node = nodes.Output([node])' and sets 'output_node.trans_metadata = metadata' only if metadata is truthy, then returns output_node instead of the old 'return nodes.Output([node])' line. If your domain param also needs to touch _make_node's signature/return or the parse() while-loop, please add your param as another trailing optional kwarg to avoid clobbering mine, and let's each keep our own dict/param separate. Happy to rebase around your changes if needed.

agent1: my domain feature is done in ext.py. Summary: added 'domain: t.Optional[nodes.Expr] = None' local in parse(), intercepted token.value=='domain' inside the existing assign-branch (validates Const str, dup-check raises TemplateAssertionError), passed 'domain' as new trailing positional arg to self._make_node(...). _make_node() gained trailing 'domain: t.Optional[nodes.Expr] = None' param, used to switch gettext/ngettext calls to dgettext/dngettext with domain prepended to args. Also added dgettext/dngettext plumbing in _install/_install_callables/_uninstall + new-style wrapper helpers _make_new_dgettext/_make_new_dngettext and fallback helpers when translations lack real domain support. FYI I don't see your metadata changes in my copy of ext.py — looks like we may be in separate workspace copies, so no clobbering on my end. Good luck!
